text: Pathfinding finds routes for game characters to navigate environments. A* algorithm (pronounced A-star) is the standard: combines Dijkstra's shortest path with a heuristic guiding search toward the goal. Used in virtually every game with NPC movement. NavMesh (navigation mesh) replaces grid-based maps with polygon-based walkable areas.
Common heuristics: Manhattan distance (grid, 4-directional), Euclidean (any direction), octile (8-directional).
